characters.name: Alchemist
characters.description: Potion crafter. High ATK and LUC from experiments.

characters.name: Archer
characters.description: Swift ranger. High AGI, reliable damage.

characters.name: Beast Tamer
characters.description: Monster collector. High AGI and LUC, great for item hunting.

characters.name: Berserker
characters.description: Rage warrior. Massive ATK, low DEF.

characters.name: Dark Knight
characters.description: Cursed warrior. Extreme ATK and HP, cursed luck.

characters.name: Dragon Sage
characters.description: Ancient dragon master. Extreme HP and ATK.

characters.name: Dragoon
characters.description: Dragon warrior. High ATK and HP, dragon power.

characters.name: Gunslinger
characters.description: Speed shooter. Best-in-class AGI.

characters.name: Knight King
characters.description: Royal warrior. Balanced power at the highest level.

characters.name: Mage
characters.description: Glass cannon. Extreme ATK, fragile HP.

characters.name: Ninja
characters.description: Shadow striker. Extreme AGI, glass cannon.

characters.name: Oracle
characters.description: Fortune seer. Highest LUC in the game.

characters.name: Paladin
characters.description: Holy tank. High HP and DEF.

characters.name: Pirate Captain
characters.description: Treasure hunter. Permanently doubles gold earned.

characters.name: Rogue
characters.description: Agile striker. High AGI and LUC.

characters.name: Samurai
characters.description: Honorbound warrior. Highest ATK with strong DEF.

characters.name: Shaman
characters.description: Nature spirit. Extreme LUC bonus.

characters.name: Summoner
characters.description: Fortune summoner. LUC-focused, great for drops.

characters.name: Templar
characters.description: Holy crusader. Well-rounded defensive fighter.

characters.name: Time Mage
characters.description: Temporal caster. High AGI and LUC, manipulates fate.

characters.name: Titan
characters.description: Colossus warrior. Permanently increases item drop rate.

characters.name: Valkyrie
characters.description: Divine warrior. Excellent HP and DEF.

characters.name: Vampire Lord
characters.description: Undead predator. Massive HP and ATK.

characters.name: Warrior
characters.description: Balanced fighter. Good all-around starter.

characters.name: Witch
characters.description: Chaos mage. High ATK and LUC, unpredictable.

achievements.name: Collector
achievements.description: Own 30 different items in the bank

achievements.name: Hard: First Trophy
achievements.description: Defeat your first boss in Hard Mode

achievements.name: Hard: Flawless
achievements.description: Finish a Hard Mode run without dying

achievements.name: Hard: Streak Blaze
achievements.description: Reach a 30-kill streak in Hard Mode

achievements.name: Last Stand
achievements.description: Use all 3 revives in one run

achievements.name: Normal: Clean Run
achievements.description: Finish a Normal Mode run without dying

achievements.name: Normal: Quick Pickoff
achievements.description: Kill a Normal Mode boss below the zone level

achievements.name: Normal: Streak Spark
achievements.description: Reach a 20-kill streak in Normal Mode

achievements.name: Speed Clear
achievements.description: Kill a boss below zone's min level

achievements.name: Untouchable
achievements.description: Win a battle without taking damage
